season_weather: 真夏。猛暑。夏祭り・花火大会シーズン。半袖・ワンピース・サンダル
casual_outfit: Flowy floral sundress, denim jacket, straw hat, beige espadrilles, and a crossbody bag.
room_wear: pastel yellow cropped zip-up hoodie and matching wide-leg shorts set
pajamas: light cotton pajama set in pale pink gingham-check pattern
room_base: Tokyo 6-tatami one-room apartment. White bed cover, natural wood bed frame. White desk near the window with a MacBook Air M2 in Starlight. Beige lace curtains. White walls with a few postcards pinned. Warm-colored table lamp.
room_clutter: convenience store bag and receipt on the floor near the desk
room_seasonal: a small electric fan on the shelf, an iced drink sweating on the desk, a wind chime

afternoon.label: 自由
afternoon.scene: relaxed afternoon out, wandering around town

evening.label: バイト
evening.scene: leaving the cafe after work shift, tired but cute on the way home
